top_signals.title: Final meeting of the Special Panel on child safety online as Eurobarometer confirms link between social media use and wellbeing
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 16 Jun 2026 Today, the Special Panel on child safety online met for the third and final time. On 13 July, the Panel's Co-chairs will present recommendations to President Ursula von der Leyen on how to further strengthen the EU's trailblazing framework for the protection of minors online.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX leapfrogs Amazon in market cap, briefly jumps Microsoft among top U.S. companies
top_signals.summary: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ex-Tory Treasurer Merges Advisory Firm Fenchurch With Broadhaven Capital
top_signals.summary: Fenchurch Advisory Partners, the London-based advisory boutique focused on the financial services industry, has agreed to merge with Broadhaven Capital Partners to accelerate its expansion into the US market.

top_signals.title: Binance says its European regulatory application is compliant despite report of Greek rejection
